negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. name: av_33cc49a5-332a-460f-ae60-91599d4376e3
prompt: The video opens with a view from inside a vehicle, showcasing the dashboard and windshield wipers in the foreground. A dark-colored SUV, likely a Tesla Model Y, is driving ahead, navigating through a roundabout. The ego vehicle slowly moves forward, following the dark-colored SUV. The road is bordered by landscaped areas with greenery and trees, and modern buildings are visible in the background. The sky is partly cloudy with patches of blue, indicating a clear day. Other vehicles, including a red car and a white sedan, are seen moving around the roundabout. The ego vehicle does not pass the stop sign on the grassy area on the right. As the video progresses, the dark-colored SUV in front of the ego vehicle continues its journey through the roundabout, turning right with its right blinker on. Additional vehicles, such as a silver car, enter the frame from the left side. The ego vehicle briefly stops to allow the two leading cars to turn onto the roundabout. The scene remains calm and orderly, focusing on the movement of the two leading vehicles merging into the lane. By the end of the video, the dark-colored SUV is still in motion, and the roundabout continues to be active with various passing vehicles.
